item.title: Coiled Wines to Close Garden City Tasting Room
item.description: Garden City’s Coiled Wines will close its tasting room early next month. Owner Leslie Preston announced the closure on Instagram, noting that her winemaking days are coming to an end. The tasting room will close on May 3, but Coiled wines will continue to be available online and through local restaurants and shops. Coiled has been a key part of Garden City’s wine scene since opening its production facility in 2017.
